INSERT INTO session_preset
            (
                id,
                name,
                description,
                is_default,
                window_width,
                window_height,
                is_shuffle,
                created_at,
                updated_at
            )
            VALUES (?1, 'Quick Croquis', 'Default single-step croquis preset', 1, '960', NULL, 0, ?2, ?2)
